parsed.recommendation_text: For travel, the Baseus 65W charger offers a great balance of portability and power. At $25.99, it's within your budget and includes GaN technology for efficient charging. Despite some minor issues with laptop compatibility, its dual ports and compact form factor make it ideal for on-the-go use. The included cable is an added convenience.
parsed.selection_rationale: Offers good value and meets travel needs.
